default.defaultTitle: Archetype Original — Servant Leadership for Modern Teams
default.description: Archetype Original helps leaders build sustainable organizations through servant leadership, culture clarity, and proven systems for growth.
default.keywords: servant leadership, leadership consulting, business culture, executive mentorship, fractional leadership, Bart Paden

about.title: Meet Bart Paden | Archetype Original
about.description: Thirty-three years inside organizations where leadership either held or broke. Bart Paden on the story, the posture, advisory, consulting, and fractional leadership.
about.keywords: Bart Paden, Meet Bart, leadership advisory, servant leadership, Archetype Original, The Room

methods.title: Methods | Archetype Original
methods.description: How Bart Paden mentors and consults: real conversations, actionable clarity, and leadership growth without dependence.
methods.keywords: leadership methods, servant leadership framework, leadership systems, company culture, Archetype Original

what-i-do.title: What I Do | Archetype Original
what-i-do.description: Mentorship, consulting, speaking, and fractional leadership by Bart Paden—real conversations that build clarity and lasting growth.
what-i-do.keywords: leadership consulting, executive coaching, workshops, fractional leadership, business mentoring, mentorship, Bart Paden, Archetype Original

accidental-ceo.title: Accidental CEO | Archetype Original
accidental-ceo.description: A leadership story about building something real, navigating growth and strain, and choosing to lead when the weight shows up before the clarity does—by Bart Paden.
accidental-ceo.keywords: Accidental CEO, Bart Paden, servant leadership, leadership book, company culture, leadership under pressure, Archetype Original

remaining-human.title: Remaining Human | Archetype Original
remaining-human.description: A dystopian leadership eBook by Bart Paden on servant leadership, clarity, and staying human while AI reshapes work.
remaining-human.keywords: Remaining Human, Bart Paden, servant leadership, AI leadership, leadership eBook, Archetype Original

the-room.title: The Room & Advisory | Archetype Original
the-room.description: The Room — a short book on the structural limits of honest feedback inside authority. Private advisory outside your system when you are ready for the conversation that cannot happen inside the room.
the-room.keywords: The Room, Bart Paden, leadership advisory, honest feedback, organizational behavior, Archetype Original

advisory.title: Leadership Advisory | Archetype Original
advisory.description: One room. Outside the system. No consequence. Advisory for leaders, executives, and founders who already know their room is not fully honest.
advisory.keywords: leadership advisory, Bart Paden, executive advisor, The Room, Archetype Original, private advisory

books.title: Books by Bart Paden | Archetype Original
books.description: Three books on leadership, organizational behavior, and the human cost of every decision leaders make. The Room, Accidental CEO, Remaining Human.
books.keywords: Bart Paden, The Room, Accidental CEO, Remaining Human, leadership books, Archetype Original

home.title: Archetype Original | Leadership Advisory — The Honest Conversation Hasn't Happened Yet
home.description: Private leadership advisory outside your system — and The Room by Bart Paden ($27): why no internal room can be fully honest, and where the conversation actually begins.
home.keywords: leadership advisory, Bart Paden, honest feedback, organizational honesty, The Room book, Archetype Original

archy.title: Meet Archy | Archetype Original
archy.description: Not a chatbot — Bart's brain, trained on his corpus: books, frameworks, journal, and decades inside real organizations. Site-wide context, ALI intelligence layer, and an honest handoff when a human room is what you need.
archy.keywords: Archy, Bart Paden, leadership AI, ALI, Archetype Original, servant leadership, corpus

culture-science.title: Culture Science | Archetype Original
culture-science.description: Where leadership, behavioral research, and lived experience converge. Research, reality, and responsibility behind ALI and the tools that measure what most organizations never measure.
culture-science.keywords: Culture Science, ALI, leadership conditions, organizational research, Bart Paden, Archetype Original

scoreboard-leadership.title: Scoreboard Leadership | Archetype Original
scoreboard-leadership.description: When leadership becomes a game to win instead of a mission to serve, everyone eventually loses. A Culture Science Anti-Project: how scoreboard leadership shows up, what servant standards replace it with, and where honest work begins.
scoreboard-leadership.keywords: Scoreboard Leadership, servant leadership, leadership metrics, culture, Bart Paden, Culture Science, Archetype Original

bad-leader-project.title: The Bad Leader Project | Archetype Original
bad-leader-project.description: Anonymous stories of leadership dysfunction and leadership health, neutralized before publishing and reviewed before release. Pattern visibility at scale for leaders and teams.
bad-leader-project.keywords: Bad Leader Project, leadership behavior, Culture Science, anonymous stories, leadership patterns, Archetype Original

contact.title: Contact Bart Paden | Archetype Original
contact.description: A direct line to Bart Paden. General questions about the work, the books, speaking, or what working with Bart looks like.
contact.keywords: contact Bart Paden, Archetype Original contact, leadership advisory inquiry

engagement-inquiry.title: Work Together | Archetype Original
engagement-inquiry.description: Start a conversation with Bart Paden about advisory, consulting, or partnership work. The engagement inquiry is where that conversation begins.
engagement-inquiry.keywords: work with Bart Paden, leadership advisory, Archetype Original engagement, start a conversation
